title: Minerraria
description: Starts Terraria when player joins world
body:
# Minerraria – A Unique Mod for Minecraft  

Minerraria is an unconventional Minecraft mod that blends two iconic games. When you enter a Minecraft world, the mod automatically launches Terraria via Steam and closes Minecraft, creating an unexpected twist in your gameplay.  

[Find Steam version here!](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3420467227)

🎮 **How to Install?**  

Minerraria is available for ~~both Fabric and~~ **Forge**. Just click **Download** and you are done!

🔍 **How Does It Work?**  

When you load a world in Minecraft, the mod launches Terraria and closes Minecraft. This creates a seamless and surprising transition between the two games.  

⚙️ **System Requirements**  

- **Minecraft:** 1.21.4
- **Terraria:** Must be installed on Steam  
- **Steam:** _Should_ be running in the background  

🐛 **How to Report Issues?**  

If you encounter any problems, make sure Terraria is installed and Steam is running. Otherwise, the mod will not function properly. I dont think i will fix any bugs in future

❓ **Frequently Asked Questions**  

- *Can I choose whether Terraria launches?*  
  No, the mod performs its function automatically without confirmation.  

- *Does Minecraft close instantly?*  
  Yes, as soon as Terraria launches, Minecraft shuts down.  

- *Does this mod work with a pirated version of Terraria?*  
  No, Minerraria relies on Steam API and requires an official copy of the game.  

💡 **Why Should I Use This?**  

Minerraria is not just a mod—it’s a meme in mod form! Perfect for content creators, pranksters, or anyone who wants to confuse their friends (or themselves). If you’ve ever wanted to start playing Minecraft but somehow end up in Terraria instead, this mod has you covered.
